summary: Freeform text summary of the problems with the inefficiencies or failure modes in the trace: The system failed to complete the task because it repeatedly restated the same PDF-text evidence without obtaining direct Figure 1 OCR, continued despite tool limitations until hitting the round limit, and only weakly verified the exact on-figure label (e.g., FileSurfer repeatedly said it could not confirm the figure image text while WebSurfer kept citing surrounding text instead).
raw:
A.
